name: Position: Coding Benchmarks Are Misaligned with Agentic Software Engineering
summary: arXiv:2606.17799v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Coding agents have become a major mode of software engineering, but the benchmarks we use to compare them were designed in a pre-agent era:...
description: arXiv:2606.17799v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Coding agents have become a major mode of software engineering, but the benchmarks we use to compare them were designed in a pre-agent era: they collapse model, harness, and environment into a single end-to-end score, typically computed against one reference solution, with no component-level signal for iteration. We argue that current co...
author: Maria I. Gorinova, Macey Baker, Amy Heineike, Maksim Shaposhnikov, Rob Willoughby, Dru Knox
